lines.speaker: Episodes Originally Transcribed by
lines.text: Eric Aasen, Mindy Mattingly Phillips, and guineapig.
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is at the kitchen table and Chandler is in the living room.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do you realize that four weeks from today we're getting married? Four weeks baby!! Four weeks!!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do you realize you get louder each week?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There's still so much to do. Have you written your vows yet?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I figured I'd buy those. Pat, I'd like to buy a vow. (Laughs)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sweetie, you know I have no sense of humor when it comes to the wedding.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Right. So uh, have you written yours yet?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! But I know exactly what I'm going to say.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do you happen to know what I'm going to say?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (handing him a pad of paper and a pen) Let's just do it right now. Okay? It won't be hard. Just say what's in your heart. (She goes back, sits down, and starts feverishly writing.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (watching in her) (in his head) Look at her go! She must love me more than I love her! What's wrong with me? Ooh, don't open that door.
Opening Credits
Joey and Rachel's, Chandler is getting help writing his vows from Joey and Ross.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (writing) Monica, there are no words... (To Joey and Ross) There are no words! This should not be this hard!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, uh... (To Ross) Oh hey, you've done this before Ross, well what did you say when you made up your vows?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well with Carol, I promised never to love another woman until the day I die. She made no such promise.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm so pathetic! Monica knows what she wants to say! You should've seen her. Writing, writing, writing!
Monica and Chandler's, Monica has hit a writer's block as Rachel and Phoebe enter.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What is the emergency?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You have to help me! I'm supposed to be writing my vows and all I have is this! (Shows them what she's been working on.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I like the pretty little drawing of you in the wedding dress.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, except your breasts look kinda small. (Points.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Those are my eyes! Those are my breasts. (Points.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Yeah! (Monica glares at her.)
[Cut to the guys.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, why don't you just start with something simple. Like umm, Monica from the moment I met you, I knew I loved you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I'm not sure I can do that.
[Flashback to when Chandler was introduced to Monica in The One With The Thanksgiving Flashbacks.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...everyone, this is Chandler!

lines.speaker: Fat Monica
lines.text: Hi, I'm Ross's little sister.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (seeing her) Okay.
[Cut to the girls.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay. Okay. Umm, maybe you can start with, "Chandler, even though we were friends; there was a part of me that always knew I wanted more."
[Flashback to The One With The Jellyfish, Chandler and Monica are lying on the beach.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, there's a nuclear holocaust, I'm the last man on Earth. Would you go out with me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ennnh.
[Cut back to the girls.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ooh, are we allowed to lie in the vows?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well maybe you don't talk about your feelings back then. Maybe you just say something about y'know all the things that he's taught you. Like... (They all try to think about one example and don't succeed.) Or all the things you taught him.
[Flashback to The One With Phoebe's Uterus, Monica is teaching Chandler how to turn a woman on. They're in Monica and Rachel's apartment and Monica has just drawn a diagram of a woman.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Now everybody knows the basic erogenous zones. (She starts labelling them) You got one, two three, four (Chandler is shocked to find out there's more than three), five, six, and seven!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (shocked) There are seven?! (Points to one) That's one?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's kind of an important one!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, y'know-y'know what, I was looking at it upside down.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, y'know, sometimes that helps. (She realises what that could've meant.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right. Umm, you could uh start out with a little 1, a 2, a 1-2-3, 3, 5, a 4, a 3-2, 2, a 2-4-6, 2-4-6, 4, (Rachel starts getting worked up) 2, 2, 4-7, 5-7, 6-7, 7 ...7.....7...7-7-7-7-7-7-7-7-7-7-7-7...(mouths 7)! (They both lean back on the couch satisfied.)
[Cut to the guys.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I got it! How about saying something like, "Monica...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (writing) Monica...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "...when I look back over our time together..."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (writes what Joey said and waits for him to go on) Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I can't do everything! Look back over your time together.
[This starts a series of flashbacks beginning with Monica and Chandler in the waiting room in The One With the Birth.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, look, twins. Hi, guys. Oh, cute, cute.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No fair. I don't even have one. How come they get two?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You'll get one.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh yeah? When?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right. I'll tell you what. When we're 40, if neither one of us are married, what do you say you and I get together and have one?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why won't I be married when I'm 40?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, no, no. I just meant hypothetically.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ok, hypothetically, why won't I be married when I'm 40?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, no, no.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is it? Is there something fundamentally unmarriable about me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (trapped) Uh, uh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Dear God! This parachute is a knapsack! (throws himself over the back of the chair he was sitting in)
[Cut to Ross leaping into Chandler's Hotel room in London in The One With Ross's Wedding.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (Screaming) I'm getting married today!! Ahh, whoo-hoo!!(He runs back out the door.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (Comes up for below the covers and looks concerned.) Do you think he knew I was here? (Chandler quickly looks at Monica not knowing what to say.)
[Cut to Chandler opening the door to his and Joey's apartment to reveal Monica standing there with a turkey on her head in The One With The Thanksgiving Flashbacks.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nice try.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait, wait, wait! (She puts a Shriner's hat on the turkey.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, Monica...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Look! (She puts a big, yellow pair of sunglasses on the bird.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is not going to work.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I bet this will work! (She starts dancing and Chandler cracks up.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You are so great! I love you!
Monica stops suddenly and turns around slowly.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nothing! I said, I said "You're so great" and then I just, I just stopped talking!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You said you loved me! I can't believe this!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No I didn't!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes, you did!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No I didn't!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You love me!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No I don't! Stop it! Stop it! Stop it! Stop it!
Joey walks in and sees Monica. He freaks out and runs back into the hallway, screaming.
[Cut to Chandler trying to hint to Monica that he wanted to move in with her in The One After Vegas.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know I was thinking, what if I uh, unpack here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then all your stuff would be here.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, what if all my stuff was here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then you'd be going back and forth all the time, I mean it doesn't make any sense.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. What if we lived together and you understand what I'm saying?
[Cut to Chandler entering his and Monica's apartment alight with a thousand candles in The One With The Proposal.]
He walks dejectedly into his apartment to find it lit with about a thousand candles and Monica standing in the living room.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You wanted it to be a surprise.
He turns to look at Joey who smiles slyly and closes the door leaving them alone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God.
Monica gets down on one knee.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler... In all my life... I never thought I would be so lucky. (Starting to cry.) As to...fall in love with my best...my best... There's a reason why girls don't do this!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay! (He joins her on one knee) Okay! Okay! I'll do it!  Oh God, I thought... (Starting to cry, pauses) Wait a minute, I-I can do this. (Pause) I thought that it mattered what I said or where I said it. Then I realized the only thing that matters is that you, (Pause) you make me happier than I ever thought I could be. (Starting to cry again.) And if you'll let me, I will spend the rest of my life trying to make you feel the same way. (Pause as he gets out the ring.) Monica, will you marry me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes.
The crowd goes wild as he puts the ring on her finger. They hug and kiss this time as an engaged couple.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (yelling through the door) Can we come it yet?! We're dying out here!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come in! Come in! (Joey, Rachel, and Phoebe burst through the door.) We're engaged!!!
Everyone screams and has a group hug.
Commercial Break
Central Perk, Phoebe and Rachel are on the couch as Joey and Ross enter.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, what have you guys been up to?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, we were helping Chandler write his vows, but he kicked us out because Joey kept making inappropriate suggestions.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How is "Monica, I love your sweet ass," inappropriate?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How's Monica coming along with her vows?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well let's just say its she's lucky she has a sweet ass, 'cause she's not so good at the writing.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can't believe in four weeks they're gonna be married!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well let's just hope it works. Y'know nine out of ten marriages end in divorce?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Phoebe that's not true.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, you're right. How's the Mrs.?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I can't believe they've been together for three years.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shocked) Has it been that long?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Believe me, it seems like less because they hid it from us for so long.
[Flashback to Joey interrupting a bath Monica and Chandler are sharing in The One With All The Kissing. Monica dives underwater as Joey opens the door.]
They move into kiss but are interrupted by Joey knocking on the door.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, it's me! I'm comin' in!
Monica quickly dives under the water as Joey enters. He looks a little shocked at what Chandler's doing.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I've had a very long, hard day.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ahh, I'm gonna go get some chicken. Want some?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ahh, no thanks. No chicken, bye-bye then.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.
Joey leaves and Monica comes up for air.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you okay? I'm so sorry, he wouldn't leave. He kept asking me about chicken.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chicken? I could eat some chicken.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey Joe!
Monica goes back underwater as Joey re-enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, can I get a 3-piece, some cole slaw, some beans, and a Coke-(Yelps in pain as Monica grabs him underwater)-Diet Coke.
Joey gives him a thumbs up and heads for the chicken.
[Cut back to Central Perk.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know why they didn't just tell us.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know! I mean it's not like we weren't cool about it.
[This starts a series of flashbacks starting with Monica and Chandler forcing Joey to keep his new found knowledge of their secret relationship in Monica's bedroom in The One With All the Kips.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Chandler) You?! (To Monica) And-and you?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes, but you cannot tell anyone! No one knows!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How?! When?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It happened in London.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: IN LONDON!!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The reason we didn't tell anyone was because we didn't want to make a big deal out of it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But it is a big deal!! I have to tell someone!
They both grab him and stop him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No-no-no-no-no! You can't!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Please? Please?! We just don't want to deal with telling everyone, okay? Just promise you won't tell.
Joey thinks it over.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! Man, this is unbelievable!
[Cut to Rachel listening to a phone conversation between Chandler and Monica in The One With All the Resolutions.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) I can't wait to be with you!  I'll just tell Rachel I'm gonna be doing laundry for a couple of hours.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (on phone) Laundry. Huh. Is that my new nickname? (Rachel is absolutely stunned, she opens her mouth in absolute amazement.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on phone) Awww, y'know what your nickname is, Mr. Big...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Arghh!! (She quickly hangs up the phone and starts to pace around wondering what to do.)
[Cut to Phoebe in Ross's new apartment looking at Monica and Chandler and what they're about to do in The One Where Everybody Finds Out.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looking out the window) Oh, look! There's Monica and Chandler! (Starts yelling.) Hey! Hey, you guys! Hey! (Chandler and Monica start taking each other's clothes off.) Ohh!! Ohh! Ahh-ahhh!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (screaming) Ahhh!! Chandler and Monica!! Chandler and Monica!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: CHANDLER AND MONICA!!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: OH MY GOD!!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: OH!! MY EYES!!! MY EYES!!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe!! Phoebe!! It's okay!! It's okay!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: NO! THEY'RE DOING IT!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I KNOW!! I KNOW!! I KNOW!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: YOU KNOW?!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, I know! And Joey knows! But Ross doesn't know so you have to stop screaming!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) What's going on?

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Rachel
lines.text: Ohhh!!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (trying to divert his attention from the window by jumping up and down) HI!! Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nothing! Oh God, we're just so excited that you want to get this apartment!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Actually, it looks really good. (Turns towards the window and now Phoebe starts jumping to divert his attention.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (Screaming incoherently.) Get in here!!! (Motions to join her and Rachel.)
Ross starts jumping and screaming incoherently and hops over and joins in on the group hug.
[Cut to later in that episode in Central Perk, a meeting with Phoebe, Rachel, and Joey where they discuss Chandler and Monica.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, so now they know that you know and they don't know that Rachel knows?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes, but y'know what? It doesn't matter who knows what. Now, enough of us know that we can just tell them that we know! Then all the lying and the secrets would finally be over!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or, we could not tell them we know and have a little fun of our own
[Cut to later in that episode. Rachel and Phoebe are going to a movie from Monica and Chandler's, and as Phoebe walks by Chandler she pinches him on the butt and exits.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right honey, we'd better go if we wanna catch that movie.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bye Chandler! (She walks up to him.) (Quietly.) I miss you already. (She pinches his butt.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (after they've left) Okay, did you see that?! With the inappropriate and the pinching!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Actually, I did!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, so now do you believe that she's attracted to me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohhh, oh my God! Oh my God! She knows about us!
[Cut to later in that episode. Monica and Chandler are confronting Joey in his apartment about Phoebe's knowledge.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe knows about us!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well I didn't tell them!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Them?! Who's them?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhhh, Phoebe and Joey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And Rachel. I would've told you but they made me promise not to tell!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh man, they think they are so slick messing with us! But see they don't know that we know that they know! So...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ahh yes, the messers become the messies!
[Cut to later in that episode. Phoebe is telling Rachel in Monica and Chandler's that Chandler wants to make a date with Phoebe.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'll have to get back to you on that. Okay, bye! (Hangs up.) Oh my God! He wants me to come over and feel his bicep and more!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you kidding?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I can not believe he would do that to Mon-Whoa! (She stops suddenly and slowly turns to point at Joey. Joey is avoiding her eyes.) Joey, do they know that we know?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They know you know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh, I knew it! Oh I cannot believe those two!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: God, they thought they can mess with us! They're trying to mess with us?! They don't know that we know they know we know! (Joey just shakes his head.) Joey, you can't say anything!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I couldn't even if I wanted too.
[Cut to later in that episode. Chandler is in his bathroom with Monica, and he's panicking on how far Phoebe is pushing him.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen, this is totally getting out of hand! Okay? She wants me to put lotion on her!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's bluffing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, she's not backing down! She went like this! (He does a little mimic of her dance.)
[Cut to the hallway where Phoebe is conferring with Rachel.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He's not backing down. He went to get lotion.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering the hall) Oh man! Aren't you guys done yet?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey look, just look at it this way, the sooner Phoebe breaks Chandler the sooner this is all over and out in the open.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I like that! (To Phoebe) Oh, okay! Show him your bra! He's afraid of bras! Can't work 'em! (He swiftly rips open the front of Phoebe's dress revealing her bra.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey! (Examining the dress.) Wow, you didn't rip off any buttons.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's not my first time.
[Cut to the bathroom.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You go back out there and you seduce her till she cracks!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, give me a second! (Pause) Did you clean up in here?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Of course.
[Cut back to the living room. Chandler slowly exits the bathroom and gets pushed from behind by Monica and sees Phoebe closing the apartment door.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, you're-you're going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, not without you, lover. (She slowly walks over to him and is showcasing her bra.) So, this is my bra.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (swallowing hard) It's very, very nice. Well, come here. I'm very happy were gonna have all the sex.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You should be. I'm very bendy. (Pause) I'm gonna kiss you now.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not if I kiss you first.

They move closer to together and Phoebe hesitantly puts her hand on Chandler's hip. He puts his hand on her left hip but then decides to put his hand on her left hip. Phoebe then grabs his butt. Chandler goes for her breast, but stops and puts his hand on her shoulder.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I guess there's nothing left for us to do but-but kiss.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Here it comes. Our first kiss.

They slowly and hesitantly move their lips together and kiss gently. Phoebe has her eyes wide open in shock and Chandler is squinting. He finally breaks the kiss after only a short while and pushes Phoebe away.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay! Okay! Okay! You win! You win!! I can't have sex with ya!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And why not?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because I'm in love with Monica!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're-you're what?!
Monica comes out of the bathroom like a bolt, and Rachel and Joey both enter.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Love her! That's right, I...LOVE...HER!!! I love her!! (They walk together and hug.) I love you, Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you too Chandler. (They kiss.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just-I thought you guys were doing it, I didn't know you were in love!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So that's it! It's over! Everybody knows!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well actually, Ross doesn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, and we'd appreciate it if no one told him yet.
[Cut to later in that episode. Ross is showing his boss his new place and notices something in the window.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (He notices something through the window.) No! No! Wh... What are you doing?!! (Dr. Ledbetter is slowly backing away.) GET OFF MY SISTER!!!!!!!!!!!!!
Central Perk, Phoebe, Rachel, Joey and Ross are talking.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know, you're friend's getting married, it's gotta change things.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You really think it would be that different?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How could it not be? I mean pretty soon they're gonna be having kids, and then they're just gonna be hanging out with other couples who have kids. And then maybe they're gonna have to leave the city to be near a Volvo dealership.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, things change.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't want them to move to a Volvo dealership!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It'll be okay Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm sorry, I just...I like things the way they are.
[Flashback to the gang in Central Perk in The One Where Nana Dies Twice, they're all going through an old photo album.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, who's this little naked guy?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That little naked guy would be me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aww, look at the little thing.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, yes, fine, that is my penis. Can we be grown-ups now?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who are those people?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Got me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, that's Nana, right there in the middle. (Reads the back) 'Me and the gang at Java Joe's'.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow, Monica, you look just like your grandmother. How old was she there?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Let's see, 1939... yeah, 24, 25?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Looks like a fun gang. (They all look at each other and smile)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, look-look-look-look-look! I got Monica naked!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looking) Nono, that would be me again.
[Cut back to Central Perk, Monica and Chandler are entering.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, you guys!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, we were just talkin' about you guys gettin' married and how great it is.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you can get a Volvo. If that's what you really want.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh that's so sweet.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So we both finished our vows.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, can we read them?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, I don't hear Chandler's and he doesn't hear mine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.
They spilt into their sexes and the girls read Monica's and the guys read Chandler's. The girls gasp and groan and the guys laugh hysterically.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Monica) Oh, that's beautiful.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Chandler) (laughing) Funny one! That's good!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (To Monica) Monica, will-will you marry me?
Ross laughs.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What? I don't get it.
Ross points to the explanation and he gets it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Chandler) Oh man, this is hilarious.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Don't worry honey, we'll make yours funnier.
Ending Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Ross and Joey are reading Chandler's new vows.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, what do you guys think?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (quietly) Dude!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (starting to cry) I have never known love like this.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You really like it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude! How-how did you write this?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I stole Monica's and changed the name.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You can't do that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: If he goes first he can!
End
